## n4 doc-updater evidence

Changes made:
- agents/contractor.md: Added "Crash recovery." bold paragraph after the cmdFinalize atomicity description (between the sink-merge safety-guard sentence and the `If SINK_KIND is pr:` sentence). The paragraph instructs contractors to run `resume --json` to detect `reason:'finalize_incomplete'`, then re-run `cmdFinalize --keep-worktree` to re-enter and continue at Step 7.
- commands/kaola-workflow-finalize.md: Added `## Crash Recovery` section after the contractor Agent(...) code block (around line 592) and before `## Step 9 - Sink`. Section explains detection via `resume --project {project} --json`, `"reason":"finalize_incomplete"` vs `"reason":"already_finalized"` interpretation, and recovery via contractor re-dispatch.
- plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/commands/kaola-workflow-finalize.md: Applied identical `## Crash Recovery` section in the same relative position (after contractor Agent block, before `## Step 9 - Sink`). Content is forge-neutral.
- plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/commands/kaola-workflow-finalize.md: Applied identical `## Crash Recovery` section in the same relative position. Content is forge-neutral.
